hero.subtitle: Dr. Ana Carolina Pacheco Nekrycz — Pediatrician and Pediatric Pulmonologist
hero.description: Individualized care, grounded in science and guided by Child Health principles, so your child grows strong, healthy, and ready for life.

about.name: Dr. Ana Carolina Pacheco Nekrycz
about.subtitle: Individualized Care, Based on Science
about.bio1: Dr. Ana Carolina Pacheco Nekrycz is more than a doctor; she is a partner in your child's journey of growth. With a dual specialization in Pediatrics and Pediatric Pulmonology, she offers a comprehensive and humanized perspective, grounded in science and respect for each child's individuality and their family.
about.bio2: Her care spans from the Prenatal Pediatric Consultation — preparing parents for their baby's arrival — to adolescent follow-up. Working at the Emunah Institute, Dr. Ana Carolina integrates Child Health with expertise in treating complex respiratory diseases such as asthma and bronchiolitis.
about.bio3: With over 10 years of practice, she works attentively to the particularities of each case, prioritizing dialogue, clear information, and shared decision-making with the family.
about.cred4: Graduated from USP (University of São Paulo)
about.quote: Caring for your child's health is an act of love

services.title: Complete Medical Care at Every Stage of Childhood
services.description: Pediatric follow-up goes far beyond treating illness. It involves prevention, constant guidance, and careful attention to the child's complete development.
services.service4: Motor, cognitive, and emotional developmental milestones
services.service7: Nutritional assessment and childhood obesity prevention
services.service9: Diagnosis and treatment of childhood diseases
services.ctaDescription: Private consultations dedicated to thoroughly understanding medical history and guiding each family with clarity.

treatments.title: Comprehensive Follow-Up for Healthy Growth
treatments.description: Child development is a continuous process involving physical, cognitive, emotional, and social aspects.
treatments.treatment1: Neuropsychomotor Development — motor, cognitive, and language skills
treatments.treatment4: Social Development — interaction, communication, and emotional bonds
treatments.treatment5: Affective Development — bonds, emotions, and emotional security
treatments.note: Each child has their own pace, and medical follow-up allows that time to be respected, ensuring the right stimulation at each stage. Early identification of delays enables more effective interventions, fostering learning and independence.

differentials.title: Specialized Guidance for the Early Years
differentials.subtitle: The first months of a baby's life are filled with discoveries and doubts. Having close medical follow-up makes all the difference for navigating this phase with confidence and peace of mind.
differentials.diff1Description: Preparing the family for the baby's arrival — anticipating questions and providing practical guidance on first care, breastfeeding, and safe sleep.
differentials.diff2Description: Practical guidance on breastfeeding, complementary food introduction, prevention of selective eating, and childhood obesity prevention.
differentials.diff3Description: Comprehensive follow-up including vaccination schedule updates, healthy sleep routines, and affectionate education for developing autonomy.

locations.title: A Modern, Complete Environment for Your Comfort
locations.description: Care provided at EMNH Instituto de Medicina, a space designed to offer the best experience for your family.
locations.feature1: Modern and complete facilities, ideal for clinical follow-up with comfort for the whole family
locations.feature2: Excellent clinical team, combining wisdom and understanding to care for overall health
locations.feature3: Minor procedures and laboratory and imaging exams on-site — everything in one place
locations.addressLine2: Várzea da Barra Funda — São Paulo

faq.title: Families Who Trust Dr. Ana Carolina
faq.description: Stories of families who found warmth, trust, and specialized care.
faq.testimonial1Text: Dr. Carol is excellent! She was able to identify several conditions in my son early on. She knew how to welcome and calm me. She's always available for questions via WhatsApp. I recommend her with closed eyes! She has definitely saved us many trips to the ER.
faq.testimonial1Detail: Mother of Rafael, 1 year and 3 months
faq.testimonial2Text: Dr. Ana Carolina is an exceptional doctor — she looks at the baby as a whole and embraces the whole family. That is true child health care. It even makes the beginning of motherhood lighter, especially for first-time moms like me, with so many insecurities and doubts. I trust her completely!
faq.testimonial3Text: Dr. Ana Carolina has been my daughters' pediatrician since they were born. She follows them with enormous attention and care, respecting each child's pace during appointments, always conveying a calm that the little ones feel too, making each visit easier.
faq.testimonial3Detail: Mother of Bianca (3 years) and Clara (7 months)
faq.ctaTitle: Ready to care for your child's health?
faq.ctaAddress: Av. Marquês de São Vicente, 2219 — Várzea da Barra Funda

howItWorks.title: What You Need to Know
howItWorks.description: Quality information to help you better care for your child's health.
howItWorks.topic1Description: Asthma is the most common chronic disease in childhood. Early diagnosis and proper treatment allow children to live full, active lives.
howItWorks.topic2Description: A common respiratory infection in infants, usually caused by RSV. Specialized pediatric follow-up is essential for proper management.
howItWorks.topic3Description: Starting solid foods is a key milestone. Proper guidance ensures healthy eating habits are established from the very beginning.
howItWorks.topic4Description: Quality sleep is essential for child development. Medical guidance helps establish healthy and safe sleep routines from the early months.
howItWorks.topic5Description: Vaccination is one of the most important forms of prevention in child health, protecting against serious diseases and ensuring community health.
howItWorks.topic6Description: Monitoring neuropsychomotor development allows early identification of any changes, enabling timely and more effective interventions.
